---
title: "Xinran (Lena) Lu"
subtitle: "<span style='color: #666666'><i class='bi bi-geo-alt'></i> San Francisco Bay Area"
image: profile1.jpeg
page-layout: full
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 12em     
  id: hero-heading
  links:
        # 设为 # 表示不可点击，纯展示
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/xin-ran-lu
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/XinranStat
  
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  grid-columns: 3
  image-height: 350px
  fields: [image, subtitle, title, description]
  id: sample-listings

---

:::{#hero-heading}

<div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; height: 100%;">

## Data & Financial Analyst

I bridge the gap between **complex financial data** and **strategic decision-making**. 

Currently based in San Jose, CA, seeking Data Analyst and Financial Analyst roles in the Bay Area. 

My expertise includes:

- **Data Stack**: Python (Pandas, NLP, Scikit-learn), SQL, Tableau, Excel
- **Domain**: Credit Risk Assessment, Financial Modeling, Market Trend Research, Quantitative Analysis
- **Education**: 
M.S. in Economics & Computer Science @ Drexel University | M.S. in Finance @ University of Maryland

<!-- [Download Resume >](resume.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-lg role="button"} -->

</div>

:::

<br><br>

## Selected Projects

:::{#sample-listings}
:::
